F

EG Union

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3304-03-23 · 11 mentions
Active: 3304-03-23 → 3307-12-31
Description

EG Union is the military and political faction led by Yuri Grom, operating as the power base for his independent expansionist agenda. In October 3307, EG Union forces defeated Delta Pavonis Galactic Interstellar in a system conflict, capturing the Federal megaship Freedom's Foundation as spoils of war.

The victory represented a direct military confrontation between Grom's forces and Federal auxiliaries, with Grom publicly denouncing President Hudson as "the corrupt heart of the Federation's rotting carcass." EG Union serves as both the governing authority in Grom-controlled systems and the military arm of his challenge to Federal influence in the frontier, embodying his strategy of leveraging independent pilot support to secure territorial gains against superpower opposition.

Mentions Timeline (11 articles)
3307-12-31
A Retrospective of 3307 (Part Four)
Historian Sima Kalhana concludes her 3307 review, covering the Yuri Grom honey trap, Torval family rift, Colonia Bridge, NMLA's final stand, and Salvation's superweapons.
3307-10-07
Yuri Grom Victorious Against Federation
EG Union defeats Delta Pavonis Galactic Interstellar in the Delta Pavonis system conflict, with Yuri Grom claiming the Federal megaship Freedom's Foundation as spoils of war.
3307-10-04
Ambassador Condemns Entrapment of Yuri Grom
The Federal Diplomatic Corps officially denounces President Hudson's attempt to capture Yuri Grom in Delta Pavonis, with Ambassador Delphine Dumont offering personal apologies.
3307-09-30
Yuri Grom Targeted by Federal Strike
The Delta Pavonis political conference erupts into conflict as undercover Federal agents attempt to apprehend Yuri Grom, who escapes and declares war on the Federation.
3307-09-24
Progress Between Federation and Yuri Grom
Negotiations between the Federation and Yuri Grom in Delta Pavonis show unexpected mutual respect, with a potential deal for trade ties while maintaining independence.
3307-09-17
Delta Pavonis Hosts Political Conference
The Federation and dictator Yuri Grom hold a diplomatic conference in Delta Pavonis to determine the system's allegiance, marking the first official engagement between the two.
3304-04-07
Week in Review
This week's major stories include Aegis constructing two megaships, the Acropolis and the Vanguard, to coordinate anti-Thargoid operations and support independent pilots. Pilots responded to the Aegis report on Thargoid history with mixed reactions. Conflict erupted in Ross 310 between Ross 310 Natural Services and the Ross 310 Cartel. The EG Union successfully concluded its campaign to build a shipyard in Ross 720.
3304-03-31
Week in Review
This week's major stories include Aegis constructing two megaships, the Acropolis and the Vanguard, to coordinate anti-Thargoid operations and support independent pilots. Pilots responded to the Aegis report on Thargoid history with mixed reactions. Conflict erupted in Ross 310 between Ross 310 Natural Services and the Ross 310 Cartel. The EG Union successfully concluded its campaign to build a shipyard in CPC 20 6743.
3304-03-30
EG Union Campaign Concludes
The EG Union has announced the successful conclusion of its campaign to build a shipyard in CPC 20 6743. Hundreds of pilots delivered commodities to Lyakhov Dock and eliminated agitators in surrounding systems to ensure trader safety.
3304-03-24
Week in Review
This week's major stories include Aegis publishing a Thargoid report based on Ram Tah's decrypted Guardian logs, revealing the two species' ancient war over territory. Professor Alba Tesreau noted humanity's situation echoes the Guardians'. Federal President Zachary Hudson and Imperial Admiral Denton Patreus rejected diplomatic options. The Socho Thargoid-clearing operation concluded successfully. Yuri Grom announced a new shipyard in CPC 20 6743 for capital ship production. Sirius Corporation announced expansion in Ceos and Sothis with new starports, settlements and megaships.
3304-03-23
EG Union Campaign
Yuri Grom has announced an initiative to create a new shipyard in the CPC 20 6743 system to produce capital ships for defending human space from human and alien threats. The EG Union has placed orders for commodities and kill orders on wanted ships to protect traders. EG Pilots will eliminate agitators while independent combat pilots are asked to help neutralise threats.
